description: The Solana Community Validator Discussion on July 7, 2022, covers updates on validator metrics, software versioning, and a new proposal for a minimum stake amount of 1 SOL for future delegations. Participants are encouraged to report metrics for compliance and engage with the community for feedback.
topic_summary: Discussion includes updates on validator software versions [t=30:20], new metrics reporting requirements [t=135:14], and a proposal for a minimum stake of 1 SOL for new delegators [t=258:61].
